SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[layering-strict] active: boundary compliance must be validated and reported explicitly.'"

UserPromptSubmit.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[layering-strict] enforce: keep callbacks routing-only and avoid cross-layer logic leakage.'"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[layering-strict] gate: final response must state boundary validation outcome and unresolved risks.'"
